column2: Abilities are player-controlled actions that require deliberate input to execute. They are the core of active gameplay, representing the special moves and utilities unique to each creature. Typically, each creature can equip a maximum of four Abilities at any time (there are exceptions). Most abilities have cooldowns tied to them.

column4: In-Game Description
column5: Functionality

column4: Stops stamina regen in trade for increased speed and damage
column5:
- Automatically activates if HP is below 20% ~ Legacy Functionality
- 20% Damage increase
- 25% Speed increase 
- Disables stamina regeneration
- Applies 10 Stacks of Adrenaline (28s-30s Duration)

column4: Experience a burst of fast sprinting at the cost of faster consumed stamina
column5: - Customizable per creature

column4: A ranged ability which refreshes food sources in range
column5: - Refills food sources by 20%

column4: A ranged ability which refreshes water sources in range
column5: - Refills water sources by 20%

column4: Place burrows and teleport to underground burrows in the world
column5:
- Maximum of 4 burrows
- Cooldown of 3 seconds upon entering/exiting a burrow

column4: Spew a breath from your mouth which deals varying effects
column5: All breaths and their info can be found on the Breaths Data sheet

column4: A ranged ability which impacts those in range by reducing damage but increasing speed
column5:
- Damage reduced by 50%
- All speeds increased by 40%
- Applies 10 Stacks of Fear (28s-30s Duration)

column4: Forces a weather to occur
column5:
- Changes weather
- Cannot change important events (such as Blood Moon and Wardens Nebula)

column4: Begin filling a charge meter while running, dealing extra effects on hit once fully charged
column5:
- All charges do some knockback
- All charges have a cooldown of 5 seconds after being used
- All charges take 5 seconds to activate

column4: Begin filling a charge meter while running, dealing extra effects on hit once fully charged
column5: Gore charge applies 2 bleed and 10 Deep Wounds (28s-30s Duration)

column4: Begin filling a charge meter while running, dealing extra effects on hit once fully charged
column5: Power charge increases damage by 50% and applies 2 Shredded Wings (3s-6s Duration)

column4: Begin filling a charge meter while running, dealing extra effects on hit once fully charged
column5: Crush charge applies 8 injury and does 50% less damage

column4: Begin filling a charge meter while running, dealing extra effects on hit once fully charged
column5: Launch charge does extra Knockback and applies 2 Confusion (3s-6s Duration)

column4: Begin filling a charge meter while running, dealing extra effects on hit once fully charged
column5: Throw Charge launches players upwards, applies 2 Broken Bones (3s-6s Duration), and 1 Shock (0s-3s Duration)

column4: Cocoon yourself for a short time, slowly healing your health, then emerge stronger with a brief damage boost.
column5:
Applies the Cocooning Status for 5 seconds.
Afterwards, apply the Cocooned Status for 5 seconds.
Then finally, apply the Cocoon Rage Status for 20 seconds (6.66 stacks)

column4: Inflict your opponent with a curse, decreasing their healing for a short time and giving them a random ailment afterwards
column5:
- Applies a customizable amount of Bad Omen which decreases health regen by 25%
- Applies 3 Tunnel Vision (6s-9s Duration)
- Once Bad Omen runs out, applies a set amount of a random ailment:
5 Frostbite, 8 Burn, 10 Bleed, 4 Blurred Vision, 5 Corrosion, 3 Confusion, 3 Disabled Spacebar + 3 Shredded Wings, 20 Disease, 10 Injury, 10 Necro Poison, 10 Poison

column4: Experience a burst of movement in water at the cost of stamina
column5: - Customizable power and stamina cost per creature

column4: Link up to 3 nearby creatures, causing hits dealt to one of them to be applied to all of them.
column5:
- All linked creatures apart from the target take 20% reduced damage
- Link is broken if creatures travel more than 90 studs apart from each other 
- 20s Duration
- Currently exclusive to Ardor Warden until further notice

column4: A ranged ability which impacts those in range by causing erratic controls and impacting vision
column5:
- Makes your controls erratic 
- Applies 3 Stacks of Dazzling Flash (6s-9s Duration)
- Applies 2 Stacks of Blurred Vision (3s-6s Duration)
- FOV is increased 2x

column4: Causes those within your radius to have the drowsy ailment, which causes bite slowness
column5:
- Applies 5 Stacks of Drowsy (13s-15s Duration)
- Adds 5 Stacks of Slowed (13s-15s Duration)

column4: A ranged ability which applies injury to those in range
column5:
- Instantly applies 40 injury to all nearby players 
- Costs 25% Stamina to use
- Applies 4 Aftershock to the user (9s-12s Duration)

column4: Allows a creature to steal eggs from another's nest
column5:
- User can steal eggs from any nest
- Can sniff eggs
- Fully eating an egg restores 20 food and applies Satiated

column4: At the cost of health, gives yourself a speed boost to escape the area
column5:
- Costs 40% HP to use
- Speed is increased by 100%
- Fully refills stamina bar
- Releases you from any grab/latch upon use 
- Applies 10 Stacks (28s-30s Duration)

column4: An ability which clears ailments and grants ailment resistance to the user, also increasing weight
column5:
- Clears any negative ailments
- Increases weight by 5%
- Applies 3 stacks of Fortify (6s-9s Duration)

column4: An area-of-effect ability, applying the frostbite ailment to any creatures around you
column5:
- Applies 3 Frostbite every 3s
- Range of the AOE is customizable per creature
- 15s Duration

column4: Place a snare that tethers nearby creatures to a central point, applying frostbite over time until they break free.
column5:
- Applies 5 Frostbite when initially used
- Tether takes 5 hits to break
- 20s Duration

column4: Grab another player when they are near your head
column5:
- Can only grab creatures 25% lighter than yourself 
- Cannot grab the tier higher

column4: Decreases the players speed in trade of more weight and increased healing
column5: - Applies 10 Stacks of Harden (28s-30s Duration)

column4: A toggleable ability which heals any nearby players while active
column5: - Heals other players by a customizable % every 3 seconds

column4: A toggleable ability which allows you to swap from damage to healing mode
column5:
- Won't apply offensive ailments when on
- When on, heals for customizable healing value

column4: Applies a healing ailment to creatures around you, and yourself
column5: - Applies 10 Healing Pulse to everything in range (28s-30s Duration)

column4: An ability which costs health to use and increase damage
column5:
- Reduces health by 50% on use
- Applies 10 stacks of Hunters Curse (28s-30s Duration)

column4: An ability where you appear fully invisible to those around you
column5:
- You can walk, eat, drink, sit, lay & mudroll while invis
- Running, attacking, or flying will disable it
- can be sniffed unless you have Hidden Scent

column4: Leap forwards, upwards, or backwards at the cost of stamina
column5: - Length, height, and stamina cost of jump are fully customizable

column4: Launches a concentrated lance that pierces forward, damaging and slowing enemies on direct impact, and deals area of effect ailment damage over a short interval.
column5:
- Deals 5% max HP damage and applies the 'Slowed' Status on direct impact
- Spawns an AoE that lasts 5 seconds
- Deals 1% max HP and 1 specified ailment per second if the target remains in the AoE

column4: Latch onto another player when they are near your head for 5 seconds
column5: - Currently drains 15% of max stamina on use

column4: Allows you to heal yourself based on the bite damage you do to others while active
column5:
- Heals you for a customizable % of the damage you deal to others while active
- Applies 4 stacks of Life Leech (9s-12s Duration)

column4: An ability which allows you to place a mud pile to roll in for healing benefits
column5:
- 2 can be placed at once
- Removed upon creature death/mene

column4: Affects those in a radius with poison
column5: - Applies 5 poison

column4: A ranged toggleable ability that applies corrosion to creatures in your vicinity
column5: - Applies 3 corrosion every 3 seconds

column4: An ability which allows you to reflect applied damage back onto the attacker while you are immune
column5:
- Deflects damage you receive back onto the target
 - Applies 2 Stacks of Reflect (3s-6s Duration)

column4: Spit a blob of acid that splashes on impact, damaging enemies and coating the area in a caustic haze that inflicts continuous corrosive damage. Costs hunger and cannot be used when below 25% hunger.
column5:
- Deals 5% max HP damage and applies the 'Slowed' Status on direct impact
- Spawns an AoE that lasts 10 seconds
- Deals 1.5% max HP and 0.5 Corrosion per second if the target remains in the AoE

column4: A special ability which sets you back 10 seconds in the past on use while also healing you a little
column5:
- Teleports the user to their position 10 seconds ago
- Heals up to 75% health on use if the users hp was higher 10 seconds ago
- Sets any applied ailments on the user to their amounts from 10 seconds ago 
- Currently exclusive to Hellion Warden until further notice

column4: An ability which allows you to self destruct when on low health, dealing huge damage and burn to nearby players at the cost of your own health
column5:
- Only usable below 25% health 
- Deals 35% damage to all nearby players which scales with weight
- Applies 10 burn to all nearby players 
- Deals knockback to all nearby players 
- Leaves the user on 2.5% health after use

column4: Tap into the shadow dimension to strike your last-hit creature three more times.
column5:
- The amount of hits dealt by the ability is customizable per creature 
- Each hit following the initial one does 10% less damage 
- Also applies any ailments the user has each hit 
- Only creatures hit in the last 10 seconds can be hit by the ability
- Currently exclusive to Shadow Creatures until further notice

column4: Causes disoriented movement and grounds fliers/prevents takeoff for a short time
column5:
- Makes the movement of other players erratic
- Knocks fliers out of the air
- Applies 4 Stacks of Shock (9s-12s Duration)

column4: An ability which conceals you with a shield and increases hunger and thirst drain
column5:
- Only one can be placed at a time
- Thirst and Hunger drain increased by 200% while active
- Takes 40 hits to destroy
- Press keybind again to remove

column4: An ability which requires stamina and increases your speed and stamina regeneration
column5:
- Reduces stamina by 50% on use
- Applies 6 Stacks of Speed Blitz (16s-18s Duration)

column4: A ranged ability that decreases the speed of those in your vicinity and increases your own speed
column5:
- Applies 4 Stacks of Speed Gift to self (9s-12s Duration)
-Applies 4 Stacks of Stolen Speed to all others (9s-12s Duration)

column4: An ability which begins increasing your damage and ailments on use but taking some time to fully charge
column5:
- Takes 5 seconds to fully charge 
- Charge immediately begins depleting after fully charged 
- Increases damage by a customizable %
- Doubles offensive ailments when fully charged

column4: An ability to drop a puddle of stamina which grants bonuses to stamina regen when rolled in
column5:
- Puddle must be mud rolled in to apply
- Increases stamina regen by 200%
- 2 can be placed at once
- All puddles removed upon users death/menu
- Applies 180 stacks of Stamina Puddle (538s-540s Duration)

column4: Drops a trap causing those ensnared to move slower
column5:
- Can place 2 at once
- Reduces walk, run, and swim speeds by 75%
- Disables flying/jumping
- All traps removed upon users death/menu
- Applies 4 stacks of Sticky Trap & Broken Bones (9s-12s Duration)

column4: An ability where you can drop your tail as a food source to increase your speed, yet your weight is decreased. Your tail costs food to regrow
column5:
- Makes your tail model invisible while active
- Food is worth 8 food points and applies 30 enriched
- Decreases weight by 40%
- Increases speed by 35%
- Tail can be regrown and stat changes reverted at the cost of 30% hunger

column4: Face your tail to whip behind you
column5: - Tail damage varies per creature

column4: Place a thorn trap which slows, damages, and applies bleed to anyone who steps on it
column5:
- Can place 3 at once 
- Deals 5% damage on contact 
- Applies 6 bleed on contact 
- Applies 1 Freeze (0s-3s Duration)
- Trap is destroyed after coming in contact with someone
- All traps are destroyed upon user death/menu

column4: A placeable totem that applies an ailment to nearby players every few seconds
column5:
- Applies 2 of an ailment every 3 seconds when in range
- Can be broken by attacking 
- Maximum of 1 placed at once
- All totems are removed upon users death/menu
- (Only Poison totem exists as of current)

column4: Place a trap that causes those ensnared to receive poison
column5:
- Applies 5 poison every 3 seconds when touched 
- Applies 4 Stacks of Broken Bones (3s-6s Duration)
- Maximum of 2 placed at once
- All toxic traps are deleted upon users death/menu

column4: Switch between two different forms, with each form providing its own damage and bite cooldown buffs/debuffs
column5:
- Tranquility: +60% damage, +60% bite cooldown
- Madness: -37.5% damage, -37.5% bite cooldown

column4: An ability which requires stamina to raise your damage but prevents stamina regeneration
column5:
-Reduces stamina by 50% on use
- Applies 6 stacks of Unbridled Rage (16s-19s Duration)

column4: As you are damaged your attack power increases at the cost of no healing
column5:
- Only occurs when creature is an adult 
- Stamina regeneration is increased by 2x
- Grants Ailment immunity below 50% HP
- HP cannot be regenerated while active
- Damage multiplier is 1x while the creature is at max health, will increase up to 8.5x damage at half health
- Can be activated via ability key, but also activates automatically when attacked

column4: A ranged ability which impacts those in range by slowing them down and impacting their vision
column5:
- Slows all speed stats by 25%
- FoV increased by 200%
- Applies 7 stacks of Water Gale (19s-21s Duration)

column4: Allows a creature to drop a "bomb" projectile whilst flying, knocking back ant creatures hit, and damaging them.
column5:
- The ailment applied by the ability is customizable per creature, but not the amount which is always 4
- Applies 2 stacks of Slowed (3s-6s Duration)
